Class: Context

bemap.Context()

Base class for Context.

Constructor

new Context()

Parameters:
Name Type Description
options. object
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 252

Members

chargingStationProvider :string

Default charging-station provider name (e.g. `'ecoMovement'`). When set, `bemap.ChargingStations.search()` and `bemap.EvSmartRouting.calculate()` fall back to this value when the request itself does not specify one. Only names exposed by the user's ACL (see `bemap.helpers.listChargingStationProviders`) are accepted server-side.
Type:
  • string
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 328

glyphsUrl :string|null

Optional override for the MapLibre glyphs (font) URL template, e.g. `'https://my-host/fonts/{fontstack}/{range}.pbf'`. When set it wins over every style's own `glyphs`. Leave unset and the library bundles no fonts: the tiny fallback style requests none, and server styles fetch their own glyphs from the Worker (a root-relative `/fonts/...` is absolutised to `/fonts/...` by `bemap.TilesStyle.resolvePlaceholders`).
Type:
  • string | null
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 379

(protected) host :string

Define the host name of BeMap server. By default "bemap-beta.benomad.com".
Type:
  • string
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 267

(protected) login :string

Define the login.
Type:
  • string
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 281

(protected) password :string

Define the Password.
Type:
  • string
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 288

(protected) path :string

Define the path of bgis context. The string must be start with / character. By default "/bgis/".
Type:
  • string
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 274

(protected) protocol :string

Define the protocol used. The HTTP or HTTPS, by default the HTTP.
Type:
  • string
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 260

tilesFile :string

PMTiles map served by the Worker — a bare name (the `.pmtiles` suffix is optional): an alias (`'osm'`, `'here'`) or an exact tileset (`'OSM_250901_WORLD'`). Defaults to `'default'`, which the Worker resolves to the configured default map server-side (via `_config/maps.json`), so the client never pins a map version. Aliases are case-insensitive.
Type:
  • string
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 366

tilesHost :string|null

BeNomad Tiles Worker host, e.g. `'mptiles-api-beta.benomad.net'`. When set, `bemap.MapLibreMap` will route its background through PMTiles instead of WMS. Leaflet and OpenLayers ignore this field and keep WMS unchanged.
Type:
  • string | null
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 338

tilesPath :string

Optional URL path prefix on `tilesHost`. Empty by default.
Type:
  • string
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 354

tilesProtocol :string

Protocol used to reach `tilesHost`. Default `'https:'`.
Type:
  • string
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 346

tokenStorage :string

Where the JWT lives between page loads: `'session'` (default), `'local'`, or `'memory'` (no persistence).
Type:
  • string
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 388

getChargingStationProvider() → {String|null}

Return the configured default charging-station provider, or `null` when none is set. Mirrors the convenience shape of `getGeoserver()`.
Since:
  • 1.5.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 568
Returns:

String | null

Return the default BaMap Geoserver of context.

Returns:
BeMap Geoserver
Type
String

getTilesBaseUrl() → {string|null}

Return the base URL of the BeNomad Tiles Worker, e.g. `'https://mptiles-api-beta.benomad.net'`.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 409
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesDefaultStyleUrl() → {string|null}

URL of the Worker default-STYLE pointer (`/api/default-style`) — returns the name of the MapLibre style applied when the developer pins no style. Used for the "load the live charte from the server after login" default path.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 479
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesDefaultUrl() → {string|null}

URL of the Worker default-map endpoint (`/api/default`) — returns the filename the `default` alias currently resolves to (or `null` server-side).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 513
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesFileUrl(fileopt) → {string|null}

Build the URL of a PMTiles archive (or `{z}/{x}/{y}.pbf` directory) served by the Worker. Resolves to `https://{tilesHost}{tilesPath}/{file}`.
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
file string <optional>
 Archive file name; defaults to `Context.tilesFile`.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 526
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesLoginUrl() → {string|null}

URL of the Worker login endpoint (`/api/login`).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 420
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesLogoutUrl() → {string|null}

URL of the Worker logout endpoint (`/api/logout`).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 442
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesMapsUrl() → {string|null}

URL of the Worker map-config discovery endpoint (`/api/maps`) — returns the default map, aliases, and the allow-listed tileset filenames for this env.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 454
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesStatusUrl() → {string|null}

URL of the Worker status endpoint (`/api/status`).
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 431
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesStylesUrl() → {string|null}

URL of the Worker style-list endpoint (`/api/styles`) — returns the allow-listed style files for this env.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 466
Returns:
Type
string | null

getTilesStyleUrl(name) → {string|null}

URL of a named MapLibre style JSON served by the Worker. Accepts either a bare style name (`'openfreemap_graylevel'` → `/styles/openfreemap_graylevel`) or a Worker-relative path as returned by `/api/styles` (`'styles/openfreemap_graylevel.json'` → `/styles/openfreemap_graylevel.json`). A leading slash is stripped; a value that already carries a path segment is resolved against the tilesHost root rather than re-nested under `/styles/`. Returns `null` when there is no tilesHost or no name.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
name String
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 497
Returns:
Type
string | null

hasTilesConfig() → {boolean}

Return `true` when this Context has a `tilesHost` configured, meaning `bemap.MapLibreMap` should route the background through BeNomad Tiles.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 398
Returns:
Type
boolean

isAuthInPost() → {boolean}

Return true if the authentication parameters will be write in the POST data of request.
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 605
Returns:
true if the authentication parameters will be write in the POST data of request..
Type
boolean

post(options)

Perform a HTTP Post request.
Parameters:
Name Type Description
options Object
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 621

resolveTilesFile(explicitopt) → {String}

Decide which tiles map (PMTiles alias / tileset) MapLibre should load. Precedence, highest first: 1. an explicit per-call tile parameter (`explicit`, e.g. `opts.tilesFile`) 2. an explicit `ctx.tilesFile` (any value other than the 'default' sentinel) 3. `ctx.geoserver`, when set — so `geoserver: 'osm'` loads the 'osm' tiles 4. the literal 'default' — the Worker resolves it server-side The string `'default'` is treated as "not explicitly chosen", so a configured `geoserver` outranks the implicit default that `ctx.tilesFile` carries when the caller never set a tiles map.
Parameters:
Name Type Attributes Description
explicit String <optional>
 A per-call tilesFile that outranks the ctx values.
Since:
  • 2.0.0
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 554
Returns:
Type
String

setAuthInPost()

Set to true if the authentication parameters will be write in the POST data of request.
Source:
  • bemap.js, line 597
